description_long: This is a heavily armored combat tactical vehicle with a low, wide profile and a camouflage paint scheme. The vehicle features two large cannons mounted on the front, flanked by reinforced armor plating and angular surfaces for deflection. On the roof, there are two box-shaped missile launchers and additional equipment, suggesting advanced offensive capabilities. The front is equipped with a spiked plow, likely for obstacle clearing or defensive purposes. The sides display detailed surface panels, hatches, and what appear to be vision ports or sensor arrays. The vehicle moves on continuous tracks, providing stability and traction over rough terrain.
description: A camouflaged, heavily armored combat vehicle with dual cannons, missile launchers, and a spiked front plow, riding on continuous tracks.
description_view_0: Front view showing dual cannons, spiked plow, and prominent missile launchers on the roof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the length of the cannons, side armor panels, and track system.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back armor, track ends, and the angular, camouflaged body.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with clear visibility of the missile launchers and side details.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Two large cannons mounted at the front, two box-shaped missile launchers on the roof, and a spiked plow at the front.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular armor plating, including reinforced front, sides, and roof; sloped and modular panels visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Woodland camouflage pattern with irregular tan, green, and brown patches in a disruptive style.
attribute_military_markings: Red and black eye-like insignia on the upper front panels; no other visible numbers or symbols.
